steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Rewrite as $6x+7y=2170$ and divide the second by $4$ to get $6x-7y=350$. Add: $$12x=2520 \Rightarrow x=210,$$ then $7y=2170-6(210)=910$, so $y=130$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $340$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $340$ is the value to enter.
